influences.name: Nothing
influences.why: Proves you can make hardware feel playful without sacrificing restraint — permission to ship joy.

influences.name: Teenage Engineering
influences.why: Every label, number, and unit suffix on the OP-1 is a love note to craft.

influences.name: Polestar
influences.why: A color system so disciplined that the single accent colour carries the entire brand.

influences.name: Dieter Rams
influences.why: The ten principles are load-bearing forty years on — a good product is honest, and I re-read them when I'm lost.

influences.name: Alvar Aalto
influences.why: Modernism that still feels warm — proof that minimal doesn't have to mean cold.

influences.name: Charles & Ray Eames
influences.why: Playful rigour. They treated a chair and a film and a toy with the same curiosity.

influences.name: Massimo Vignelli
influences.why: Unimark's NYC subway map reminds me that editing is the craft — what you leave out does the work.

influences.name: Bruno Munari
influences.why: Design as a question, not an answer. Munari kept playing, and you can feel it in his output.

influences.name: Satyajit Ray
influences.why: Storytelling that earns every frame — a reminder that quietness is a design choice.

influences.name: Dayanita Singh
influences.why: Her book-objects taught me that a portfolio is just an edited sequence with opinions.

influences.name: Kanye West
influences.why: Obsessive iteration in public. Every album is a different take on the same question.

influences.name: Daft Punk
influences.why: Two helmets and a drum machine — brand as a tight constraint that unlocks everything downstream.
